top_signals.title: Fuel Shortages in Russia Amid Ukraine Drone Attacks
top_signals.summary: Over 50 regions in Russia are currently experiencing severe fuel shortages. These shortages are attributed to long-range sanctions and targeted Ukrainian drone strikes on Russian oil refineries and ports, which have significantly reduced Russia's refining capacity by 20-30%. Bloomberg News Senior Writer Stephanie Baker joins Bloomberg This Weekend to discuss the situation the world's second-largest oil producer finds itself in. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Here we go again? Assessing the inflation risks of the recent energy shock − speech by Megan Greene
top_signals.summary: Given at University of Derby Business School
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Dash eyes Philippines as market for crypto payments
top_signals.summary: Dash is assessing the Philippines for a potential crypto payments push as regulators promote easier business registration, though industry participants say compliant market entry can still take years.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Memory crisis hits such extremes that 'even Apple can't be safe'
top_signals.summary: Apple appears poised to take the rare step of increasing prices to deal with what CEO Tim Cook called an "unsustainable" memory shortage.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Piero Cipollone: Digital euro: the future of money
PRA sets out adjustments to its market risk internal model approach under Basel 3.1
top_signals.summary: The Prudential Regulation Authority (PRA) has today published a consultation on the internal model approach to market risk (IMA), which represents the final piece of Basel 3.1’s implementation in the UK.

top_signals.title: Accredited official statistics: Public sector finances bulletin
top_signals.summary: The public sector finances statistical bulletin.

top_signals.title: Vance says U.S. isn’t giving Iran ‘a cent’ as he defends Trump peace deal - CNBC

top_signals.title: Burnham’s ‘King of the North’ tactics will be clipped if he becomes U.K. prime minister
top_signals.summary: After winning a seat in parliament for his local area of Makerfield, Burnham, hopes to ride a level of popularity rarely enjoyed by politicians to become Britain's next leader.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Webinar: How attackers bypass MFA and how defenders can respond
top_signals.summary: Modern phishing attacks, including Device Code phishing, can undermine MFA protections and grant attackers access to corporate accounts without stealing passwords. This webinar explores how behavioral AI can help security teams detect compromised accounts faster and automate response workflows. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
